creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
Created attachment 162358
patch for 5.14 -> 5.15 update

Update of Monit port to 5.15, patch attached + output of: portlint, make check-plist, make stage-qa.

The patches for monit.c and http.c are not needed anymore (the fix is part of monit 5.15).

Thanks,
Martin
